input_meta.scope_warning: Layer0 is exact; later layers are dense attention-only rollout for the SCTM checkpoint.

method_notes.local: cyclic wrapped 2D radius mask over the stated spatial grid
method_notes.random_v: same attention masks evaluated against deterministic random value vectors to stress-test value-subspace effects
method_notes.row_topk: oracle per-row top-k retained attention mass
method_notes.sink: top-k key columns by total column attention mass
method_notes.union: oracle mask union of sink2 columns, radius-1 local mask, and row top-4 entries
